prompt:
Hand-drawn educational framework diagram on warm cream paper (#F5F0E8). Black sketch lines. Soft pastel blocks in orange, green, blue. Handwritten Chinese labels. Simple line icons.

A side-by-side comparison showing analogy between navigation app and AI reasoning.
Left: smartphone with map route, flow: 输入目的地 → 规划路线 → 按导航行驶 → 遇到封路 → 重新规划. Icons: pin, road, detour.
Right: computer/robot, flow: 接收任务 → 拆解步骤 → 执行 → 发现错误 → 自我修正. Icons: document, checklist, gear.
Center: double-headed arrow labeled "结构一致".
Bottom label: "所有自主推理框架，本质都是让AI按流程走"
Simple line art, no realistic faces.

Hand-drawn educational framework diagram on warm cream paper (#F5F0E8). Black sketch lines. Soft pastel blocks in orange, green, blue. Handwritten Chinese labels. Simple line icons.

A circular flow diagram of ReAct loop, 4 steps clockwise.
Step 1 (Think, soft blue): lightbulb icon, label "思考——我现在知道什么？"
Step 2 (Act, soft orange): gear icon, label "行动——执行一个具体动作"
Step 3 (Observe, soft green): magnifying glass icon, label "观察——行动结果是什么？"
Step 4 (Loop, soft blue): circular arrow icon, label "带着新信息回到第一步"
Arrows connect: Think → Act → Observe → Think.
Center: "ReAct = Reasoning + Acting"
Bottom: "不是先想再做，是边想边做，做完看结果，看完接着想"
Sketch style, hand-drawn feel.

Hand-drawn educational framework diagram on warm cream paper (#F5F0E8). Black sketch lines. Soft pastel blocks in orange, green, blue. Handwritten Chinese labels. Simple line icons.

Two paths showing Chain of Thought.
Top path (wrong): person jumping from start to conclusion, big red X, broken path. Label "直接跳到结论 → 容易跑偏"
Bottom path (correct): person stepping on colored stones across a river. Stones labeled: 已知条件 → 第一步推理 → 第二步推理 → 中间结论 → 最终答案. Green checkmarks. Label "每一步写出来 → 每一步都是下一步的锚点"
Bottom caption: "思维链的本质不是'解释'，是'不跳步'"
Simple silhouette figures, no faces, sketch-style.

Hand-drawn educational framework diagram on warm cream paper (#F5F0E8). Black sketch lines. Soft pastel blocks in orange, green, blue. Handwritten Chinese labels. Simple line icons.

Three columns showing human-in-the-loop intervention points.
Header: "人工接管点的三种类型"

Left (orange) - 确认站: human silhouette and robot face with question mark between them. Description: "AI不确定时停下来问你。关键决策但信息不足。"

Center (blue) - 审批站: document with "审批" stamp, human thumbs up. Description: "AI完成重要步骤，让你确认再继续。文案草稿、代码审查。"

Right (green) - 失败回退: robot with hands up, human stepping in. Description: "AI搞不定时主动认输。API不通、权限不够。"

Bottom: "在正确的地方设卡，不要在每一步都插手"
Simple line art, no realistic faces.
